title: phyllanthus floribundus
intro: Phyllanthus floribundus, also known as the green gold or green gold of thailand, is a plant species native to Thailand and other parts of Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. Phyllanthus floribundus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
